valueProps.headline: One Platform,
valueProps.description: Everything you need to launch, monetize, and grow — all in one platform.
valueProps.startFastDesc: Launch your creator page instantly. Connect your domain, publish your bio link, and add your portfolio in minutes.
valueProps.earnIncomeDesc: Sell digital products directly. Track revenue, manage transactions, and grow your income from one dashboard.
valueProps.workWithBrandsDesc: Collaborate with brands and run campaigns. Manage negotiations, deliverables, and payment milestones seamlessly.

footer.tagline: The modern platform for creators to build, monetize, and grow. Launching July 2026.

hero.subheadline: Linktree for links. Shopify for products. Mailchimp for emails. A spreadsheet for brands. There's a better way — and we're building it.

forEveryCreator.headline: For Every
forEveryCreator.description: No matter your niche, audience size, or goals — ProVibe adapts to how you create.

problemStatement.headline: 5 Tools,
problemStatement.description: Running a creator business today means juggling disconnected tools that don't talk to each other.
problemStatement.solutionDesc: ProVibe brings bio links, store, analytics, lead capture, and brand deals together — built for creators, launching July 2026.

features.headline: Everything You Need to
features.bioLinksDesc: Custom SEO-friendly pages with drag-and-drop blocks for links, media, and products.
features.analyticsDesc: Track link clicks, conversions, revenue, and audience growth in real-time.
features.leadCaptureDesc: Grow your subscriber list with forms, email capture, and broadcast campaigns.
features.brandDealsDesc: Get discovered by brands looking for authentic creators in your niche.
features.campaignsDesc: Broadcast promotions to your audience and manage affiliate link tracking.
features.digitalStoreDesc: Sell digital and physical products, services, bookings, and subscriptions.

howItWorks.headline: Launch in
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick a template, add your links, products, and content blocks. Your page is live in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add digital products, services, or affiliate links to start earning from day one.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Track analytics, capture leads, and land brand partnerships as your audience grows.

roadmap.headline: What's
roadmap.phase1Desc: Bio links, digital store, analytics, lead capture, and monetization tools — everything you need to build your creator business.
roadmap.phase2Desc: Brand-creator marketplace, campaign management, location-based events & meetups, ticketing, and offline-to-online community building.
roadmap.phase3Desc: Smart scheduling, AI content assistant, creator matching engine, and predictive analytics.

foundersNote.messageLine1: I've watched creators struggle with the same problem for years — juggling Linktree for links, Shopify for products, Mailchimp for emails, and a spreadsheet to track brand deals. Five tools, five logins, zero integration. It's exhausting.
foundersNote.messageLine2: ProVibe started as a simple question: what if creators had one platform that actually worked together? Bio links, a store, analytics, lead capture, and brand partnerships — all in one place, built specifically for how creators actually work.
foundersNote.messageLine3: We're not live yet, but we're building this in the open. If this resonates with you, join the waitlist. Your feedback will shape what we build first.
foundersNote.name: Prem Chand Saini

faq.headline: Questions?
faq.a1: ProVibe is an all-in-one creator platform that combines bio link pages, a digital storefront, audience analytics, lead capture, and brand partnerships — everything you need to build, monetize, and grow your creator business.
faq.a2: ProVibe launches in July 2026. Join the waitlist now to get early access and be among the first creators on the platform.
faq.q3: Is it free to join the waitlist?
faq.a3: Absolutely! Joining the waitlist is completely free. We'll notify you as soon as we launch so you can be first in line.
faq.q4: What features will be available at launch?
faq.a4: At launch, you'll get customizable bio link pages, a digital storefront for selling products and services, audience analytics, lead capture forms, email broadcasting, and affiliate link management.
faq.q5: How is ProVibe different from Linktree?
faq.a5: ProVibe goes far beyond link-in-bio. While Linktree focuses on links, ProVibe includes a full digital store, lead generation tools, audience analytics, campaign broadcasting, and a brand partnership marketplace — all in one platform.
faq.q6: Will there be a free plan?
faq.a6: Yes! ProVibe will offer a generous free plan that includes a customizable bio page, basic analytics, and essential monetization tools. Premium plans will unlock advanced features like detailed analytics, priority brand matching, and more.
faq.a7: After our Phase 2 launch, brands will be able to discover creators based on niche, audience size, and engagement. Creators can browse opportunities, apply to campaigns, and manage collaborations directly through ProVibe.
faq.q8: Can I sell products on ProVibe?
faq.a8: Yes! You can sell digital products (ebooks, courses, templates), physical products, services (consultations, coaching), and subscription-based content — all from your ProVibe page with built-in payments.

cta.subtitle: Join now and sell with 0% commission and 0% processing fees when we launch. This offer is only for early waitlist members.
cta.tagline: Free to join • No credit card required • Launch July 2026

creators.headline: Your Bio. Your Store.
creators.subheadline: One link to showcase everything — sell products, capture leads, and land brand deals. All from your ProVibe page.
creators.bioBuilderDesc: Drag-and-drop blocks for links, media, products, forms, and embeds. Fully customizable templates with your brand colors.
creators.leadGenDesc: Capture emails and phone numbers, broadcast campaigns to subscribers, and grow your audience list.
creators.templatesDesc: Choose from professionally designed templates and make them yours in minutes.
creators.faqQ1: How quickly can I set up my page?
creators.faqA1: Most creators have their page live in under 3 minutes. Choose a template, customize your colors and content, and you're ready to share.
creators.faqQ2: Can I use my own domain?
creators.faqA2: Yes! You can connect your custom domain or use a free provibe.com/yourname subdomain.
creators.faqQ3: What can I sell on ProVibe?
creators.faqA3: Digital products (ebooks, courses, templates, presets), physical products, services (coaching, consultations), and subscription content.
creators.faqA4: We integrate with major payment processors. You receive payouts directly to your bank account with transparent fee structures.
creators.ctaSubtitle: Be among the first creators on ProVibe. Join the waitlist and get early access when we launch.
creators.affiliateManagementDesc: Track affiliate links, monitor commissions, and measure performance across all your partnerships.
creators.analyticsDashboardDesc: Track link clicks, page views, conversions, revenue, and audience growth with real-time dashboards.
creators.digitalStorefrontDesc: Sell digital and physical products, offer services and bookings, manage subscriptions — all with built-in payments.

brands.headline: Brands, Creators &
brands.subheadline: A multi-sided ecosystem connecting brands with creators, plus a location-based events and meetups platform — launching after our creator tools go live.
brands.forBrandsDesc: Post campaigns, discover creators, and measure real ROI — all from one dashboard.
brands.creatorDiscoveryDesc: Search and filter creators by niche, audience size, engagement rate, and performance metrics.
brands.roiAnalyticsDesc: Track conversions, engagement, and ROI with real-time campaign performance dashboards.
brands.forCreatorsDesc: Discover brand opportunities and grow your income through partnerships.
brands.opportunityFeedDesc: Discover brand campaigns and collaboration offers tailored to your niche and audience.
brands.applyTrackDesc: Apply to campaigns, accept invitations, and track participation and earnings in one place.
brands.eventsDesc: A location-based discovery and hosting platform for creator meetups, brand events, workshops, and more.
brands.exploreEventsDesc: Discover events by location, category, date, and popularity. Find influencer meetups, workshops, tech events, and more near you.
brands.eventDetailsDesc: View event descriptions, agendas, speakers, locations on map, and attendee lists. RSVP, book tickets, save, and add to calendar.
brands.createHostDesc: Set up physical or virtual events with ticketing (free or paid), capacity management, and promotion tools to reach creators on the platform.
brands.eventAnalyticsDesc: Track registrations, attendance rates, and engagement metrics. Run sponsored events and brand-hosted meetups.
brands.communityEcosystemDesc: Move from tool to community — real-world networking drives collaborations and content.
brands.offlineOnlineDesc: Integrate offline events with online campaigns for deeper brand-creator engagement.
brands.revenueStreamsDesc: Ticketing fees, featured event listings, and brand-sponsored meetups.
brands.ctaSubtitle: Brand marketplace and events platform launching after our creator tools. Get notified when it's ready.
brands.campaignManagerDesc: Post requirements, set budgets, define deliverables, and manage influencer campaigns end-to-end.
brands.directMessagingDesc: Communicate with creators, share briefs, approve content, and manage deliverables in-platform.

about.subheadline: We believe every creator deserves tools to turn passion into profession — without needing technical skills or a big budget.
about.missionText: Empowering creators with an all-in-one platform to build their online presence, monetize their audience, and connect with brands — no technical skills needed. We're building the infrastructure for the next generation of the creator economy.
about.phase1Desc: Bio links, digital store, analytics, lead capture, monetization tools.
about.phase2Desc: Brand-creator marketplace, campaign management, location-based events, meetups, and community building.
about.phase3Desc: Smart scheduling, AI content assistant, predictive analytics.
about.team1Bio: Building ProVibe to give every creator the tools they deserve — one platform to build, monetize, and grow without juggling five different services.
about.ctaSubtitle: Be part of the movement that's redefining how creators build and grow their businesses.
about.value1Desc: Every decision starts with asking: how does this help creators succeed?
about.value2Desc: Clear pricing, honest communication, and no hidden fees or surprises.
about.value3Desc: Constantly pushing boundaries to give creators the best tools available.
about.value4Desc: Building a supportive network where creators help each other grow.
